programme.desc: Uncle Joe decides to take up painting and hopes to make money with his new venture When an antique dealer buys a painting Joe thinks he is a new art master on his way to success However the dealer only wants the valuable picture frame

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa is stubbornly opposed to Hassies friendship with hot rod enthusiast Eddie Collins and must be convinced that the young man is a serious engineering student and mechanic rather than a hooligan

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: To join a secret club known as the Imperial Demons Little Luke must go into an abandoned haunted house at night and succeed in taking a light all the way to the top floor

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: While Mister Ed phones in racing tips to Pimlico Race Course the Posts and the Addisons play Find The Statue

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A former potential surgeon sets out to wreak revenge on the brother whose cruel practical joke prevented him from realizing his dream

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An alcoholic reporter is inspired by a beautiful woman to find a good murder case no matter what

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A sculptor uses a drifter and his own abused girlfriend to recreate a murdersuicide

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Smarmy and opportunistic reality TV show host Jerry Rulac does an expose on the wild punk nightclub scene for the latest segment of his television program Why Are You Here Jerry uncovers more than he bargained for when he decides to focus on troubled wealthy party girl Donette and her unpredictable gaggle of scary friends

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: All of BJs greatest adversaries are assembled in Las Vegas for a Sheriffs Convention when a criminal gang stages an ambitious and inventive robbery of the Dunes Casino Caught near incriminating evidence BJ is the prime suspect Part I of a three-part epic that continued on The Misadventures of Sheriff Lobo

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Marital strife boils over in both the Post and Addison households and Mister Ed goes to work as an extra in a western movie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed attempts to torpedo Wilburs plans to have him march in the Pagent Parade

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Kommandant Klink that the heavy water being stored at Stalag 13 is a youth potion

programme.title: Hogans Hereos
programme.desc: Using the microphone that Klink has installed in the barracks Hogan tricks Klink into contacting an underground member

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew take in a young orphan girl and go out of their way to make a happy home for her on their island But their extraordinary behavior arouses Binghamtons suspicions and he uses the situation to have the 73 Crew sized up as possible Section 8s by some visiting Psychiatrists

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: During a mission to investigate the crash site of a Japanese transport plane McHale and The Crew recover 4 million dollars in American cash Thinking that its counterfeit they return to base where Gruber later trades it to Chief Urulu for some native trinkets But when they find out that the money is real - Stolen by the Japs from a bank in The Philippines - Gruber challenges Urulu to a winner-take-all poker game to get it back

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A Colonel and his young daughter are visiting Camp Henderson While befriending the little girl Pyle has no problem getting her and himself in trouble with everyone

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter is chosen to appear in a documentary but becomes an absurd camera hog leaving producers no choice but to follow Gomer performing punishments Carter doles out

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan discovers an underground source of hot water on the island but The Professor soon learns that the source of the hot water is an active volcano on the other side of the island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An impostor posing as Mr Howell claims to having been rescued and begins selling off Mr Howells stocks The real Mr Howell offers his fellow castaways a hefty reward to get him off the island and save his fortune

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Much to Grampas consternation George wants to join a private club known as the Loyal Order of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampas vanity gets the best of him when he refuses to acknowledge that he needs eyeglasses to pass the vision test for his new California drivers license

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After Max hides some secret plans he has to go into a jail to retrieve them

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The deadliest of the species A woman pretends to love Max so she can kill him

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie is attracted to an older man and pursued by a teen with a crush; Bo and Sam break a ships model meant for Merrills anniversary gift and work to fix it in time; Diana and Jeff try to find common ground between their parents

programme.title: WKRP 210
programme.desc: WKRP 210

programme.title: WKRP 104
programme.desc: WKRP 104

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood spends his wedding anniversary in New York as a guest on CBSs NFL show

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Still-unemployed Herman moves in with Freda in exchange for doing jobs around the house

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Roth is planning to put a hotel casino in Toronto and to help him with financing he organizes a consortium of businessmen But theyre having a hard time on deciding who should be in charge Roth wants Paul Bracken one of his people and Dans brother in law to be the one But one of the members of the consortium Mel Brandon wants to be the one in charge So sets out to make Paul undesirable by going after Dan and everyone around him Bea and Binzer

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Maurice a famous French chef and chemist has created something world-changing and wants to distribute it through Jonathans company but before he can tell Jonathan about it he is killed and his recipes stolen

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: George tries to fix the towns bell tower after a big snowstorm and Michael rents The Wizard of Oz to overcome his fear of wind

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick attempts to help Joanna overcome her fear of eye doctors

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens suffer from radiation poisoning and develop suits to protect themselves Meanwhile the government attempts to shut down Harrison and his team believing that the alien menace is no more

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A vengeful voodoo priestess ensnares Arcane in a voodoo curse as revenge for his enslavement of Jim Kipp who had once saved a cousin of hers from drowning Alec helps Graham and a kindly voodoo priest save Arcane from certain dea

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed psychic comes to the swamp in search of Alec Holland with a message from his dead wife Linda She also reveals that Jim is still alive and will be heard from soon

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A distortion in time produces two separate moons with two separate Alphas from different eras

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: The Dukes Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 224
programme.desc: Hercules 224

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Dr Larry Clark is a bio engineer who works on the skrills When the companions decide to get rid of a series one of them joins with Clark

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon works to stop a munitions magnate who is supplying arms to neo-nazis She reawakens memories of his late wife who was murdered by Hitler

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Frank Barker wants Joe to help him get a firearms license for the Fielder Militia The LAPD knows that the militias weapons are stolen from the Army so they have Joe string Barker along until they can arrest him and grab the weapons

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being shot Kimble is reunited with Sister Veronica whose help he needs to track down a lead about the one-armed man

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: On a train ride Audra falls seriously ill and the only doctor available to treat her has a band of ruffians in pursuit for revenge

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD may try to use a powerful sneezing weapon against Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents try to convince Gadget that he can replace the King of Pianostan

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades discredit Scooter so that no one believes him when he realizes Cy-Kill is planning a new mission

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill abducts a blind boy who can see into the future

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jal Rorda Audrics loyal friend is tricked and captured by Saw Boss where the evil scientist Dr Zorg is zapping him with the mindsifter to discover Audrics whereabouts Jayce defies Saw Boss and goes to the planet Nar to rescue Jal Gorda

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Oon is recalled by the Squire Smith for his obvious fear in the face of Monster Minds Oon fears he will be melted down Upon arriving on the Squire Smiths planet Oon walks into a trap set by Monster Minds He then proves himself to the Squire

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is firing all the cannonballs on Captain Kidds island to retrieve the gold hidden inside of them Their activity draws the attention of MASK

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An explorer discovers an ancient Mayan City where giant stones become weightless under the full moonlight He sells this information to Miles Mayhem while Matt Trakker mounts his own excursion to the same location
